name: Close Solo
description: A single performer lost in their craft, magnetic and intimate.
hld_patterns: {setting}. The world has narrowed to this single point of expression.
{setting}. Every nerve ending is channeled into the performance.
{setting}. The performer and the act become indistinguishable.

1: {subject}, centered in frame, facing camera directly, filling the frame.
2: {subject}, center-left of frame, facing right, closest to lens, filling most of the frame.
{subject}, right edge of frame, facing left, partially cropped, slightly further from lens.
3: {subject}, center-left of frame, facing right, foreground, filling most of the frame.
{subject}, right edge of frame, facing away, background, partially out of focus.
4: {subject}, far left of frame, facing right, foreground.
{subject}, far right of frame, facing left, background, smallest in frame.

background_pool: Stage flooded with a single warm spotlight, the rest of the space dissolving into black velvet darkness
Dim club interior, amber and red gel lighting wrapping the figure in smoke and glow
Rehearsal room with mirrored wall reflecting a second, ghostly angle, bare bulbs strung along the ceiling
Outdoor stage at night, colored light bars from below casting dramatic uplight, an unseen crowd suggested by faint reflections
action_pool: Eyes closed, head tilted back, mouth open
Fingers spread wide, both hands raised at shoulder height
Torso arched, chest thrust forward, chin lifted
One arm extended fully upward, fingers reaching
Lips pressed to a near-invisible breath, cheeks drawn in
Shoulders rolling in a slow, rhythmic cycle
Head bowed low, hair falling forward over the face
Whole body swaying gently, weight shifting from one foot to the other
Hands moving in fluid circular patterns at waist height
Eyes wide and blazing, locked on a point above the camera
